scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/react && npm run build -w packages/vue && npm run build -w packages/vanilla
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w packages/core && npm run type-check -w packages/react && npm run type-check -w packages/vue && npm run type-check -w packages/vanilla
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/core && npm run test -w packages/react && npm run test -w packages/vue && npm run test -w packages/vanilla
